articles.author: Andre Janse Van Vuuren, Nick Heubeck
articles.title: Dollar Firms, Stocks Look Weaker as Sentiment Ebbs: Markets Wrap - Bloomberg
articles.description: Stocks staged a global retreat, with S&P 500 futures pointing to a fourth day of declines, as investors sold all kinds of risky assets amid a rout in precious metals. Bitcoin traded near $77,000 after weekend losses.

articles.author: Janay Kingsberry, Travis M. Andrews, Niha Masih
articles.title: Trump plans to close Kennedy Center for about two years, starting in July - The Washington Post
articles.description: Under a proposal by President Donald Trump, the closure could begin July 4, with construction beginning immediately.
articles.content:
Under the proposal, the Kennedy Center could close for construction on July 4, coinciding with Americas 250th anniversary.
Updated February 2, 2026 at 12:34 a.m. EST1 minute ago

articles.title: 'TODAY' Anchor Savannah Guthrie’s Mom Missing - TMZ
articles.description: Authorities in Arizona are searching for Nancy Guthrie, the mother of 'TODAY' anchor Savannah Guthrie, who was reported missing under what authorities are calling concerning circumstances.
